title: Cobblemon Missing Recipes
description: Datapack adding recipes and vanilla mob drops for unobtainable Cobblemon items.
body:
There are 32 uncraftable items in Cobblemon, so I've made 23 recipes and modified 9 vanilla mob drops.

Simply drop this into your datapacks folder to get access to these recipes. Works in Fabric and Forge.

Check out gallery for most of the recipes. Also, credit for @Ninja Gamer#0676 (discord) for many of the recipe ideas!
